pageDescription: Generate random numbers within a specified range with customizable options for various applications

lottery.description: Generating random numbers for lottery tickets and games of chance

sampling.description: Selecting random samples for research and surveys

passwords.title: Password Generation
passwords.description: Creating random numbers for secure password components

simulation.title: Computer Simulation
simulation.description: Generating random inputs for computer models and simulations

criticalWarningsList.notTrulyRandom: These are pseudo-random numbers generated by computer algorithms
criticalWarningsList.security: Do not use for cryptographic or security-sensitive applications

importantNotesList: Pseudo-random numbers are suitable for most general applications
For cryptographic purposes, use specialized security tools
The quality of randomness depends on the algorithm used
Consider your specific needs when choosing number ranges and counts

messages.enterInformation: Enter your parameters to generate random numbers
messages.generatedMessage: Your random numbers have been generated below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This generator produces pseudo-random numbers using computer algorithms. These numbers are suitable for general applications but should not be used for cryptographic or security-sensitive purposes where true randomness is required.

seekHelp.title: Additional Resources
seekHelp.content: For applications requiring true random numbers or cryptographic security, consider using specialized hardware random number generators or consulting with security professionals.

errors.minValue: Please enter a valid minimum value
errors.maxValue: Please enter a valid maximum value
errors.decimalPlaces: Please enter a valid number of decimal places (0-10)
errors.range: Maximum value must be greater than minimum value

tooltips.minValue: The lowest number that can be generated
tooltips.maxValue: The highest number that can be generated
tooltips.count: How many random numbers to generate
tooltips.allowDuplicates: Whether the same number can appear multiple times
tooltips.decimalPlaces: Number of decimal places for decimal numbers

generate_random_numbers_in_a_custom_rang: Generate random numbers in a custom range, with or without repeats, instantly.
enter_the_minimum_and_maximum_values_for: Enter the minimum and maximum values for your range.
enter_how_many_random_numbers_you_want_t: Enter how many random numbers you want to generate.
